prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PHWWKS-16PC-STD-BL-3 Product Type: UTILITY_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 16pc Precision Hobby Arts and Crafts Knife Set with Big Handle Description: The 16pc Hobby Knife Set is great for completing detailed craft work, scrap booking and art projects.

This set comes with 13 assorted hobby blades and 3 precision knives. The blades are easily interchangeable and are great for cutting small objects.

Inside the durable plastic case you'll find a 2 metal handles and a plastic grip handle for added comfort during use. This 16pc Hobby Knife Precision is great for first time wood workers and season scrap-bookers. Search Terms: razor blade knives complete set arts craft paper cutting gift set hobby tools tool box hobby blades crafting blades exacto knives precision tools hobby crafts carving tools hobbies crafts scrapbooking school projects arts and crafts Features: - 13 Assorted Precision Blades; 3 Handles - Durable Plastic Case for Easy Storage - Great for Detailed Craft Work, Hobbies, Scrap booking, Woodworking & More === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 16-pc Precision Hobby Knife Set with Handles

tokens.name: Precision Hobby Knife Set with Handles

anthropic.title_differentiation: 13 Assorted Blades, 3 Handles, Durable Case, Arts Crafts Scrapbooking Woodworking

openai.title_differentiation: 13 Assorted Blades And 3 Handles, Durable Plastic Case, Ideal For Crafts, Scrapbooking, Woodworking, Detailed Cutting
